name: Daji

skills.name: Captivate
skills.description: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).

skills.name: Soul Impact
skills.description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage.

skills.name: Strike a Pose
skills.description: Casts a love spell at the target, dealing damage and stunning them.

skills.name: Heartbreaker
skills.description: Deals damage to random enemies within range 5 times.

tips: Daji (Mage): Tier S+ on international ranked — 51.03% WR.
Build core: Boots of Deftness, Stone of Sorcery, Scepter of Reverberation.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.03%, pick 2.38%, ban 3.13%, popularity tier S+.
Counters Luna, Diaochan · Weak into Gao Changgong, Mulan.

faqs.question: Is Daji good in current season?
faqs.answer: Daji is Tier S+ Mage with 51.03% win rate, 2.38% pick rate, and 3.13% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Daji build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Deftness, Stone of Sorcery, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Nebulon Wood, Void Staff. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Daji?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Daji: Gao Changgong, Mulan. Daji is strong into Luna, Diaochan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Diaochan. Countered by: Gao Changgong, Mulan.
